title: verbascum adenophorum
intro: Verbascum adenophorum, also known as the invasive or Mikania, is a perennial plant species native to China, but has become an invasive species in other parts of the world, including Australia and New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and alleviating digestive issues. The leaves and flowers of the Verbascum adenophorum plant can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
